page_metadata.biotools__summary: Black Pepper Drought Transcriptome Database (BPDRTDb) catalogues all the genomic information like differential expressed genes, microsatellites, variants, transcriptional factors, pathways, domain and families of assembled transcriptome associated with root drought.
